created_for: Looped decoder ablations using optimized MLX Full Attention Residuals implementation
notes: Full AttnRes scripts keep a global prior sublayer-output history.
Core loop blocks share transformer weights but use per-loop pseudo-query slots.
Optimized Full AttnRes path caches RMSNorm(source) keys once per source.
DepthMixer avoids materializing a [batch, seq, sources, dim] value stack on every call.
ATTNRES_MAX_SOURCES is a source budget and errors if exceeded; it is not a block truncation window.
